GeneralDescription.SourceString: Impulsive hacker with an explosive sense of humor.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Impulsive hacker with an explosive sense of humor.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Hi~ I'm Mae! I do codebreaking and combustibles >:D I've been kicked out of MANY hackathons and chemistry classes UwU but I think they're just jealous ;) Need help? Stop by my Deboot van! ^_^
